briefs.title: Council to vote on: Burnaby joining Building Benchmark BC energy tracking program for Year 7
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on continuing the city's participation in Building Benchmark BC (BBBC), a voluntary program that helps building owners track and compare their energy use and carbon emissions. No extra budget is needed — the estimated $16,500 cost would come from the Planning and Development Department's existing 2026 budget.
briefs.action_required: If you own a building in Burnaby, watch for BBBC recruitment outreach — you may be able to join the program for free energy data.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Building Benchmark BC Year 7 participation approval
